common.notNow: E le o le taimi nei

languages.title: Gagana
languages.subtitle: Filifili le gagana o lo'o fa'aaogaina i le polokalama atoa.
languages.noResults: E leai ni gagana e tutusa ma lau sailiga.

phone.label: Numera o le telefoni
phone.selectCountry: Filifili le atunuu po o le itulagi
phone.searchCountry: Saili le atunuu, numera faalilolilo po o le muai viliina
phone.noCountries: E leai ni atunuu e tutusa ma lau sailiga.
phone.countryButton: Suia le atunu'u, o lo'o i ai nei %{country} plus %{callingCode}
phone.required: Ulu atu i se numera telefoni.
phone.tooShort: O lenei numera telefoni e puupuu tele.
phone.tooLong: O lenei numera telefoni e umi tele.
phone.invalid: Ta i totonu se numera telefoni aoga mo le atunuu filifilia.
phone.valid: Numera o telefoni faavaomalo o loo aoga

auth.onboardingTagline: O se soa saogalemu patino mo taimi i le va o le "Ou te lelei" ma le "Ou te mana'omia se fesoasoani."
auth.createSubtitle: Filifili se metotia saini i totonu e puipuia ai lau kalafi saogalemu.
auth.invalidCode: Ta i totonu le numera faalilolilo o le faamaoniga.
auth.signInFailedMessage: E le mafai ona matou fa'amae'aina le saini i totonu. Siaki lau feso'ota'iga ma toe taumafai.
auth.googleUnavailableTitle: Google E le mafai ona saini i totonu
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Fa'aaogaina o se fonotaga mo atina'e i le lotoifale. Native Google Sign-In galue i se fausiaina atinae.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Paga nei pe faaauau pea ma faaopoopo i se taimi mulimuli ane.
auth.northStarBody: O le VL01 wearable e mafai ona fa'aosofia ai le saogalemu tafe ma taps ma umi fetaomi gaioiga.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: O lau soa saogalemu agamalu i luga o le faafanua ma i valaauga.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear mafai ona fesoasoani i le home mode, guardian mode, emergency mode, excuse call, ma le leo lagolago.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Fa'aaogaina mo le fa'afanua, sone lamatiaga, taunu'u saogalemu, ma SOS talaaga.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving fesili mo le nofoaga ina ia mafai ai e leoleo ona malamalama i le mea e ono mana'omia ai se fesoasoani. E mafai ona e suia lenei mea mulimuli ane i le Settings.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: O fa'asilasilaga e lagolagoina le siakiina ma fa'alavelave fa'afuase'i.
permissions.notificationsBody: Matou te faaaogaina na o faasilasilaga mo le saogalemu, faafouga mo faalavelave faafuasei, ma faamanatu e te faagaoioia.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: O le nofoaga e tausia ai le sa'o o le saogalemu
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving te fa'aaogaina lou nofoaga mo le saogalemu fa'afanua, sone lamatiaga, vave fa'asoa, ma SOS fa'amatalaga. E mafai ona e suia lenei mea mulimuli ane i le Settings.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: E manaomia ni faasilasilaga mo le saogalemu
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving lafoina fa'amanatu siakiina, fa'afouga mo fa'alavelave fa'afuase'i, ma fa'atonuga saogalemu e te fa'aaogaina. Matou te le fa'aaogaina fa'asilasilaga mo fa'asalalauga.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving te faaaogaina lau masini faaleotele leo pe a e amataina se soa AI po o se valaau mo le saogalemu.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving fa'aaogaina Bluetooth e fa'apipi'i ai ma NorthStar mea teuteu, faitau le tulaga o feso'ota'iga, ma fa'aosofia le saogalemu tafe mai le ofuina.
permissions.cameraRationaleTitle: O le mea pu'eata e fa'atagaina
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving te fa'aaogaina le mea pu'eata pe a e filifili e pu'eina se ata fa'apitoa pe fa'asoa se ata saogalemu.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving tausia lenei tafe avanoa mai Tulaga ma le dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Filifili le leo o le soa e lagona e sili ona saogalemu e faalogo i ai.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Mata'ituina filemu mo le saogalemu i aso uma.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Faasoa atu le talaaga i tagata faatuatuaina.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: E lima taps e mafai ona fa'ateleina i SOS ma leoleo mataala.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Fausia se mafuaaga lelei e tuua ai se tulaga le lelei.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Amata se soa i le taimi moni pe a e mana'omia le lagolago.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Fa'ata'ita'i le saogalemu tafe i se fa'ata'ita'iga maualalo-mamafa.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Taofi latalata i mea teuteu ao su'esu'eina.
jewelry.noDevices: E leai ni masini NorthStar lata ane na maua i le taimi nei.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth le mafai ona amataina le su'esu'ega. Faamolemole toe taumafai.
jewelry.scanFailed: Sa le mafai ona matou mauaina ni mea teuteu lata ane. Siaki Bluetooth, taofi NorthStar latalata, ma toe taumafai.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth le mafai ona amataina le su'esu'ega. Siaki Bluetooth avanoa ma toe taumafai.
jewelry.permissionDenied: O le avanoa lata ane o le masini ua tape. Fa'atagaina Bluetooth avanoa i le Fa'atulagaga, ona toe taumafai.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar umi se taimi e feso'ota'i ai. Faalatalata atu i ai ma toe taumafai.
jewelry.connectFailed: E le mafai ona matou feso'ota'i ma NorthStar. Siaki pe o lo'o molia ma lata ane, ona toe taumafai lea.
jewelry.emptyTitle: E leai ni masini lata ane
jewelry.emptyMessage: Taofi NorthStar molia ma latalata i lenei telefoni, ona toe faitau vave lea.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Saili mo NorthStar masini lata ane ...

home.subtitle: Dashboard soa saogalemu
home.readyBody: Leo, fa'afanua, mea teuteu, ma leoleo e tasi le pa'i ese.
home.noDevice: E leai se masini e feso'ota'i

map.title: Fa'afanua saogalemu
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go muai vaai; Mapbox tuuina atu i se atinae fausiaina.
map.updateFailed: E le mafai ona matou fa'afouina lou nofoaga. Faamolemole toe taumafai.
map.notRequested: E le'i talosagaina le ulufale atu i le nofoaga. E mafai ona e fa'aaogaina mulimuli ane mai le fa'atulagaga.
map.permissionOff: Ua tape le avanoa i le nofoaga. Fa'atagaina i Tulaga e fa'atotonugalemu ai le fa'afanua saogalemu ia te oe.
map.timeout: O lau 'upega tafa'ilagi e umi atu nai lo le mea na fa'amoemoeina. Alu i se mea e i ai se faailo manino ma toe taumafai.
map.savedEmptyMessage: O nofoaga faatuatuaina e te sefeina o le a faaali mai iinei mo se avanoa vave.

zones.crowding: Tumutumu i le leva o le po

map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Fa'afeso'ota'i ma le saogalemu i lau soa leo ...

messagesWaiting.one: %{count} savali o loo faatalitali e auina atu
messagesWaiting.other: %{count} savali o lo'o fa'atali mo le lafoina

safetyCall.useOffline: Faaaoga le soa i luga o le initoneti
safetyCall.typePlaceholder: Ituaiga pe afai e faigata le tautala
safetyCall.emptyTitle: O lau talanoaga e amata iinei
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Amata le valaau pe ta se savali pe a e sauni.

chat.notSent: E le'i auina atu le savali.
chat.retryAccessibility: Toe taumafai e auina atu le savali

history.clearMessage: O lenei mea e aveesea ai savali AI soa ua sefeina mai lenei masini.
history.cannotUndo: E le mafai ona toe fa'afo'i lenei mea.
history.title: Talaaga o talanoaga
history.subtitle: AI savali soa ua teuina i luga o lenei masini.
history.empty: E leai ni talanoaga na faasaoina i le taimi nei.
history.emptyMessage: O le a faaali mai iinei au talanoaga AI soa pe a uma lau valaauga muamua.
history.loadFailed: E le mafai ona matou utaina le tala'aga o talanoaga. Faamolemole toe taumafai.
history.clearFailed: Sa le mafai ona matou fa'amamaina le tala'aga o talanoaga. Faamolemole toe taumafai.
history.deleteFailed: Sa le mafai ona matou tapeina lena talanoaga. Faamolemole toe taumafai.

voices.title: O o'u leo o le saogalemu
voices.subtitle: Filifili le leo o le soa e lagona le sa'o e faalogo i ai.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Faamolemole toe taumafai e filifili le leo.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: E le mafai ona taina lenei fa'ata'ita'iga leo. Faamolemole toe taumafai.

boyfriend.name: Uō tama
boyfriend.description: tumau, alofa, o le taimi nei

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Faaaoga tali a soa ua tuufaatasia pe afai e le o maua ia faamaonia o le upegafesootai po o Hume.
settings.privacyBody: Auina atu i fafo pe aveese fa'amaumauga i le lotoifale o lo'o teuina i luga o lenei masini.
settings.preparingExport: Sauniuniga o le auina atu i fafo ...
settings.exportData: Auina atu i fafo a'u faamatalaga
settings.deleteAll: Tape uma faamaumauga i le lotoifale
settings.exportFailedTitle: E le mafai ona auina atu i fafo
settings.exportFailedMessage: E le mafai ona auina atu au faamatalaga i le taimi nei.
settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Aveese uma fa'amaumauga i le lotoifale?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: O lenei mea e aveesea ai lou talaaga otooto, faatulagaga, fesootaiga mo faalavelave faafuasei, talaaga o talanoaga, faamanatu o faatagaga, ma sauniga o le faamaoniga i le lotoifale mai lenei masini.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: E le mafai ona tapeese faamaumauga i le lotoifale i le taimi nei.
settings.linkFailed: E le mafai ona tatala le sootaga

sections.languageSubtitle: Gagana o le Ofisa ma le Faatagaga o le Polokalama
sections.companionSubtitle: Leo ma offline mea e fiafia i ai
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, tagata e vaaia, ma fesootaiga mo faalavelave faafuasei
sections.privacySubtitle: Talafaasolopito, auina atu i fafo, tapeina, ma faiga faavae
sections.accountSubtitle: O lau sauniga VeryLoving i ai nei

settings.updateFailedMessage: E le mafai ona matou sefeina lena mea e fiafia i ai. Faamolemole toe taumafai.
settings.signOutFailedTitle: Sa le mafai ona saini i fafo
settings.signOutFailedMessage: O loo faagaoioia pea lau sauniga. Faamolemole toe taumafai.

contacts.title: Fesootaiga mo faalavelave faafuasei
contacts.subtitle: Tagata fa'atuatuaina avanoa i le taimi o le saogalemu tafe.
contacts.addTitle: Faaopoopo le tagata e faafesootai mo faalavelave faafua
contacts.name: Igoa
contacts.phone: Numera o le telefoni e faafesootai ai
contacts.empty: E leai ni fesootaiga mo faalavelave faafuasei ua faaopoopo i le taimi nei.
contacts.emptyMessage: Fa'aopopo se tasi e te fa'atuatuaina ina ia latou sauni pe a mana'omia i latou e se saogalemu tafe.
contacts.removeMessage: O lenei tagata o le a le toe aliali mai i lau fa'alavelave fa'afuase'i.
contacts.nameRequired: Ta i totonu le igoa o le tagata fa'afeso'ota'i.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: E le mafai ona matou sefeina lenei fesootaiga. Siaki auiliiliga ma toe taumafai.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: E le mafai ona matou ave'esea lenei feso'ota'iga. Faamolemole toe taumafai.

device.title: Pulega o masini
device.subtitle: Pulea lau NorthStar masini.
device.none: E leai ni masini e feso'ota'i

friends.title: Uo
friends.subtitle: Tagata e va'aia, talosaga, ma fa'alavelave fa'afuase'i.
friends.emptyMessage: O uo faatuatuaina ma leoleo o le a faaali mai iinei pe a faaopoopo i latou.

emergency.title: Fa'alavelave fa'afuase'i SOS
emergency.subtitle: Fa'atoa fa'ateleina pe a e mana'omia le lagolago vave.
emergency.body: O lenei mea o le a logoina ai lou saogalemu ma saunia ai fesootaiga mo faalavelave faafuasei.
emergency.addContact: Fa'aopopo se tagata fa'afeso'ota'i mo fa'alavelave fa'afuase'i
emergency.quickShareMessage: Ua saunia le ulu o le faasoaina o nofoaga. Fa'afeso'ota'i le backend share endpoint e auina atu ai feso'ota'iga ola.

quickShare.title: Fa'asoa vave
quickShare.subtitle: Ua sauni le tafe o le fefaasoaa'i o nofoaga.

capybearTap.title: Capybear pa'u
capybearTap.subtitle: Fa'alua-pa'i lau NorthStar e pa'u ai se moli saogalemu.
capybearTap.body: Gesture route ua sauni mo le BLE event wiring.

errors.voiceOffline: E foliga mai e te offline. O le a lafoina lau savali pe a e toe feso'ota'i.
errors.voiceQueued: Savali faasaoina. O le a auina atu pe a toe fesootai le soa leo.
errors.voiceRetrying: Taumafai e toe lafoina lau fe'au ...
errors.voiceConnecting: Fa'afeso'ota'i ma le saogalemu i lau soa leo ...
errors.microphone: E mana'omia le fa'aaogaina o masini faaleotele leo mo vala'au leo. E mafai ona e fa'atagaina i le Settings, pe taina se fe'au nai lo lena.
errors.billing: E le o maua le soa leo i le initoneti mo se taimi le tumau. E mafai ona e fa'aauau pea ma le soa offline.
errors.authentication: E le mafai e le soa leo ona faamaonia lenei vasega. Toe saini e alu i totonu pe faaaoga le soa offline mo le taimi nei.
errors.timeout: Na umi se taimi na tali mai ai le soa leo. Siaki lau feso'ota'iga ma toe taumafai.
errors.network: Sa le mafai ona matou aapa atu i le soa leo. Siaki lau fesootaiga, ona toe taumafai lea pe faaauau i le offline.
errors.genericVoice: Sa i ai se mea na faalavelave i le valaau leo. Toe taumafai, pe faaauau pea i le soa offline.

privacy.exportTitle: VeryLoving fa'amaumauga auina atu i fafo

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving te mana'omia le avanoa o masini faaleotele leo mo le saogalemu ma AI soa vala'au.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving te fa'aaogaina lou nofoaga mo le fa'afanua o le saogalemu ma vaega saogalemu lata ane.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving fa'aaogaina Bluetooth e fa'afeso'ota'i ai lau NorthStar saogalemu teuteuga.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: E lē maua lenei filifiliga e saini ai i lenei fausia.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Fa‘aauau o se fa‘ata‘ita‘iga (mo le atina‘eina na‘o ia)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: E fa‘aaogā e le faiga fa‘ata‘ita‘i na‘o fa‘amaumauga pepelo i le masini. E le‘i fa‘amaonia auaunaga feso‘ota‘i, ma e toe seti lenei sauniga pe a toe uta le polokalame.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: E lē sa‘o pe ua uma le aogā o le numera fa‘amaonia. Talosaga se numera fou ma toe taumafai.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Ua tele naua taumafaiga e saini ai. Faatali mo sina taimi, ona toe taumafai lea.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Ua umi tele le fa‘amaoniaina o le saini. Siaki lau feso‘ota‘iga ma toe taumafai.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: E le‘i mafai ona matou o‘o atu i le auaunaga e saini ai. Siaki lau feso‘ota‘iga ma toe taumafai.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Ua uma le aogā o lau sauniga. Toe saini.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: E le‘i mafai ona uta le fa‘afanua o le saogalemu. Siaki lau feso‘ota‘iga ma toe taumafai.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: E lē maua lou nofoaga i le taimi nei. O lo‘o fa‘aalia lou nofoaga mulimuli na sefe mai le %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: E le‘i mafai ona matou fa‘asoa lou nofoaga. Siaki le avanoa i le nofoaga ma toe taumafai.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: O lo‘u nofoaga lenei na fa‘amauina i le %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: O lo‘u nofoaga mulimuli lenei na sefe ma fa‘amauina i le %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Ua tapē le avanoa i le Bluetooth. Fa‘agaoioi i le Fa‘atulagaga, ona toe taumafai lea.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Ua tapē le Bluetooth. Ki, ona toe taumafai lea.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: E lē maua le fa‘apā‘aga Bluetooth i lenei masini po o lenei fausia.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: E le‘i mafai ona matou maua NorthStar. Tuu latalata, siaki le Bluetooth, ma toe taumafai.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: E leai ni masini NorthStar lata ane na maua. Tuu latalata ma toe su‘e.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: E le‘i mafai ona matou feso‘ota‘i i le NorthStar. Ia tumau ona iai le maa ma latalata mai, ona toe taumafai lea.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: E le‘i mafai ona matou sefe lenei nofoaga. Toe taumafai.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Ua tatala le telefoni e vili ai; e le‘i fa‘amaonia le vala‘au.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Ua fa‘aleaogāina; e leai se vala‘au na faia.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: E leai se tagata fa‘afeso‘ota‘i mo fa‘alavelave fa‘afuase‘i na maua; e leai se vala‘au na faia.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: E le‘i mafai ona tatala le telefoni e vili ai; e leai se vala‘au na faia.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: E le‘i mafai ona fa‘amaonia le taumafaiga SOS mulimuli.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: E lē maua le soa leo i le taimi nei. Toe taumafai mulimuli ane pe fa‘aauau ma le soa e lē mana‘omia se feso‘ota‘iga.
releaseCritical.editContactTitle: Fa‘asa‘o le tagata fa‘afeso‘ota‘i mo fa‘alavelave fa‘afuase‘i
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Ua fa‘afou le tagata fa‘afeso‘ota‘i mo fa‘alavelave fa‘afuase‘i.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.
